text.message: I have plow on 5/4/11. Don't really want to take it because it screws you and 5 is a good block of black
I'll leave it for two nbs
need the brick i’m in an awful spot
Would trade if I had, blue
gotten 2 rolls in 15 rolls i think
the good news is that black will block the 9 sheep a third time
oj, are you gunning for 2nd or 3rd?
it looks like you're a shoe in for 3rd
Think they can make their own decisions, black. You're doing well too and make trades yourself
why is he trading the leader one for one?
You've got better wheat and ore than me which are the cards I'm porting for
thats tru but your setup is much more flexible than mine
we cannot let red get it
You're doing just as well as me dude
man, if only we had blocked him early
Black is doing better than me now that he gets army, right?
Blocking blue results in an ineffective block on black tho. I'm far more worried about black
idk why we’re not blocking him
i haven’t rolled a 7 in awhul
Especially if we trade him points
you being so worried about black just to take army gonna give blue the win
Bro, I just soloed him. You were robbing me every single turn like two orbits ago
If there were any 8s and 6s I would take road here as well
you taking road and army isn’t ideal lol
can we feed the plow to oj onto the 5?
Oj might be on 8 himself lol
i mean you refusing to rob blue the whole game cost us
black you got a knight? better if you keep army
